name: Training pipeline (with loss/optimizer loop)
author: OpenTikZ contributors
description: Supervised training loop: forward path Dataset -> Model -> Loss (with labels feeding the loss), and a backward path Loss -> Optimizer -> Model for gradients and the weight update. Parametric spacing and labels.

parameters.name: \nodesep
parameters.meaning: horizontal gap between forward stages (tikz node distance)

parameters.name: \loopdrop
parameters.meaning: how far below the model the optimizer sits

parameters.name: \datalabel
parameters.meaning: dataset stage label (use \\ for two lines)

parameters.name: \gradlabel
parameters.meaning: gradients edge label on the backward path

parameters.name: \updatelabel
parameters.meaning: weight-update edge label on the backward path

edit_contract.node_naming: fixed semantic node names: (data) (model) (loss) (labels) (opt); give any added stage a clear semantic name

operations.summary: edit the matching label macro; use \\ for two-line labels
add a node right=of the previous stage with a semantic name and re-point the forward arrows
change the palette name on the node fill/draw or the back/blabel styles; never a hex/stock color
delete the (opt) node and its two back arrows; replace with a single curved return arrow from (loss) to (model)
add another node and connect with a fwd arrow, keeping the main loop intact

invariants: keep the forward arrows (fwd) and the loop arrows (back, purple) visually distinct
colors only via the five palette names (tints/shades allowed); never inline hex or stock colors
